key.name: show-fn-lock
key.description: Whether to show the Fn Lock toggle in the menu.

key.name: show-conservation-mode
key.description: Whether to show the Battery Conservation toggle in the menu.

key.name: show-usb-charging
key.description: Whether to show the Always On USB toggle in the menu.

key.name: show-winkey
key.description: Whether to show the Super Key toggle in the menu.

key.name: show-touchpad
key.description: Whether to show the Touchpad toggle in the menu.

key.name: show-rapidcharge
key.description: Whether to show the Fast Charge toggle in the menu.

key.name: show-overdrive
key.description: Whether to show the Display Overdrive toggle in the menu.

key.name: show-gsync
key.description: Whether to show the Hybrid Graphics toggle in the menu.

key.name: show-top-bar-icon
key.description: Whether to show the extension icon in the GNOME top bar.

key.name: show-quick-settings-entry
key.description: Whether to show a GnomeVantage entry in GNOME quick settings.

key.name: show-quick-settings-dropdown
key.description: Whether the GnomeVantage quick settings tile opens as a dropdown menu.

key.name: panel-icon-name
key.description: The symbolic icon name used in the GNOME top bar indicator.
